metric_caveats: This 25-record cap measures post-guardrail direct-path behavior, not published Gan benchmark reproduction.
Compare against the pre-guardrail overnight cap-25 baseline runs/gan_s0_overnight_qwen35b_direct_cap25_20260518T222114Z when available.
Artifact-bridge repairs for few/several, hyphen/or ranges, quarter/fortnight units, and evidence-length guardrails are diagnostic and tagged separately from model-supplied outputs.
This config intentionally avoids ChainOfThought, BootstrapFewShot, and GEPA under the Qwen DSPy latency policy.
Monthly-frequency, Purist category, and Pragmatic category metrics are benchmark-facing when run at meaningful sample sizes.
Raw exact, normalized-label exact, schema validity, abstention, and evidence support are diagnostic.
Record local Ollama residency/offload separately when inspecting this run.
